{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Skysworn squad
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] swore to lead the young [[sacred artists]] as his [[Skysworn squad]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
